description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed by a low wall. The structure features a light-colored exterior with a complex roofline, including multiple gabled and hipped sections. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area, and the property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, both within the yard and near the building. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing a varied facade. The roof is primarily light gray, and the overall design suggests a modern suburban residential style. The driveway and walkway are clearly visible, leading up to the main entrance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a complex roof, covered porch, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The exterior is light-colored with asymmetrical window placement and a visible driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, landscaped yard, and multiple trees along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping leading up to the doorway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, garage area, and additional trees near the wall.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, more windows, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the yard's edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
